# Fang of Frost
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Fang%20of%20Frost&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Fang of Frost
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = u
| desc = An unearthly metal forged into a blade colder than winter in all of it's fury. Thanks to: Nekrie.

| rof = 140
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 450
| minDmg = 120
| maxDmg = 165
| feedp = 580
| fameb = 6    

| effects = yes
| pierce = yes

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable from Sprite World|range2 = 4.5}}
<noinclude>
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]</noinclude>
